prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical selfie photograph of a young East Asian woman personally holding a smartphone with one hand, with the viewpoint exactly from the phone lens only a few inches from her outstretched arm, using a 14mm ultra-wide angle that exaggerates perspective. She is standing in a minimalist seamless light gray studio, photographed from a high overhead angle looking down at her face and full body. Her long dark hair is loose with a slight center part, she wears pink sunglasses resting on top of her head, small hoop earrings, a pearl-like bracelet on the extended wrist, a fitted ribbed pink sleeveless crop top, loose light blue jeans, and white sneakers. She smiles subtly and winks one eye at the camera, creating a playful candid expression. Her extended forearm dominates the lower-left foreground with natural lens distortion and shallow depth of field, while her face is sharp and the body tapers downward toward the shoes. Use soft diffused studio lighting, natural skin texture, realistic fabric detail, authentic smartphone selfie composition, slight edge distortion, no visible phone, no text, no watermark, no beauty-filter look, no extra people.
